sentence_reviews.text: Graph compilers and inference runtimes transform model programs through tracing, lowering, scheduling, operator fusion, code generation, and device-specific execution.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Cited CUDA/ROCm sources cover device execution and DDIA covers systems concepts, but none directly documents ML graph compilers, tracing, lowering, fusion, and runtime execution as stated.
sentence_reviews.notes: Needs a compiler/runtime-specific source such as XLA, TVM, TensorRT, ONNX Runtime, or MLIR for direct verification.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion is to connect Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels to downstream capabilities including Model servers & inference runtimes, Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Structured-decoding runtimes.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support some underlying mechanisms, but this downstream capability list is atlas graph positioning rather than a directly sourced claim.
sentence_reviews.notes: Use a narrower claim or add sources for each downstream dependency if exact verification is required.
